name: Nashville City Government Host

securitySheaf.label: Credential Probe
securitySheaf.effect: A stern inspector checks forms, credentials, and routing slips.

securitySheaf.label: Scramble IC
securitySheaf.effect: Records reshuffle into wrong windows, duplicate queues, and misfiled archive stacks.

securitySheaf.label: Trace IC
securitySheaf.effect: A procedural trace follows the icon through department routing and service-ticket logs.

securitySheaf.label: Tar Baby Violation Notice
securitySheaf.effect: Permit forms and NOTICE OF VIOLATION overlays try to pin the icon in appeals processing.

securitySheaf.label: Municipal Security Escalation
securitySheaf.effect: City IT security and physical facilities staff receive correlated alerts.

encounter.consequence: Municipal Security Escalation: city IT or facilities security may receive a usable alert about the intrusion. Notify the GM if this remains unresolved.

securitySheaf.label: Bailiff Blaster IC
securitySheaf.effect: A uniformed bailiff icon locks the chamber doors and brings destructive pressure to bear.

sculpting: Downtown civic complex: marble lobbies, directory kiosks, brass plaques, fluorescent back offices, records vaults, filing caverns, utility routing maps, and red NOTICE OF VIOLATION overlays.
notes: Medium-difficulty municipal host. Public side is broad and harmless; secure side exposes permits, records, payroll/admin, utility routing, and device-control confirmations. Complexity sits between consumer-brand AB&B and megacorp Lafayette Tower.

nodes.title: Civic Host Approach
nodes.description: A city-seal kiosk waits in a marble Matrix lobby. Public service windows glow openly, while a staff-only administrative door sits behind layers of forms and badge routing.

choices.label: Use the public citizen services door
Breach the secure administrative staff door

nodes.title: Public Services Lobby
nodes.description: Directory kiosks, service windows, complaint queues, public forms, council notices, and permit lookup terminals stretch under fluorescent civic light. This is official public access only.

choices.label: Browse public permit and zoning lookup
Check public meeting and event notices
Use utility outage and service-status map

nodes.title: Public Permit Lookup Kiosk
nodes.description: Public permits, parcel records, inspection windows, and zoning summaries are available in sanitized form. Useful for cover, not secrets.

nodes.title: Public Meeting Board
nodes.description: Council calendars, public-event notices, hearing schedules, and committee summaries hang on brass plaques and scrolling red tape.

nodes.title: Public Utility Status Map
nodes.description: The public map shows sanitized outage notices, trash pickup zones, water-main advisories, and service-delay boilerplate.

nodes.title: Staff Credential Counter
nodes.description: A brass-and-marble counter checks employee credentials, department routing slips, and service-ticket authority. Failure here should not reveal the private municipal topology.

choices.label: Open the private municipal subsystem hub
Back out to public civic approach

nodes.title: Private Municipal Subsystem Hub
nodes.description: Behind the public counters are records vaults, payroll windows, permit archives, public-works routing maps, utility-control panels, and departmental mailrooms.

choices.label: Door, camera, and facility slave controls
Back out through staff credential counter

nodes.title: Permit / Zoning / Inspection Records
nodes.description: You appear to have access to protected permit packets, inspection schedules, parcel notes, zoning exception memos, and licensing records. Tell the GM you have permit-record access; ask what addresses, contractors, or dates can be searched.

choices.label: Copy useful permit and zoning paydata
Attempt to edit or suppress a protected permit

nodes.title: Employee / Payroll / Meeting Archives
nodes.description: You appear to have access to employee records, payroll routing, meeting archives, departmental mail, and interoffice routing chains. Tell the GM you have admin-record access; confirm scope before naming specific officials or files.

choices.label: Copy employee and meeting archive paydata
Search departmental mail for hidden routing
Attempt to alter a protected admin record

nodes.title: Utility and Public-Works Routing
nodes.description: You appear to have access to non-public utility routing, service tickets, public-works schedules, interruption records, and repair-zone maps. Tell the GM you have utility/public-works access; ask which systems and neighborhoods are in scope.

choices.label: Copy utility and public-works routing paydata
Locate a buried service interruption pattern

nodes.title: Facility Slave Controls
nodes.description: You appear to have access to some combination of cameras, doors, elevator routing, badge readers, utility panels, and city-facility controls. Tell the GM you have facility-control access; confirm exact physical scope before acting.

nodes.title: Camera Network Access
nodes.description: You appear to have access to a municipal camera network or camera-record index. Tell the GM you have camera-network access; confirm which feeds, buildings, time windows, or blind spots are actually available.

choices.label: Log off with camera-network access noted

nodes.title: Door and Badge Control Access
nodes.description: You appear to have access to door-control or badge-permission functions. Tell the GM you have door/badge access; confirm which sites are slaved to this host and whether changes trigger alarms.

choices.label: Log off with door/badge access noted

nodes.title: Utility Control Scope Note
nodes.description: You appear to have access to utility-linked control views. Tell the GM you have utility-control access; confirm whether this is records-only, delayed command access, or live controls before assuming a physical effect.

choices.label: Log off with utility-control scope noted

nodes.title: Red Stamp Edit Window
nodes.description: A protected form waits under a huge red stamp. Any edit will echo through approvals, denials, appeal queues, and violation notices. Permanent changes must be reported to the GM.

nodes.title: Shell Contractor Thread
nodes.description: You find a thread of contractor names, permit timing, zoning exceptions, or inspection-window oddities worth following. Tell the GM you found a contractor/permit pattern and ask what details apply.

nodes.title: Buried Case Routing Thread
nodes.description: You find a buried routing thread connecting departments, service tickets, or public-works exceptions. Tell the GM you found a civic routing clue and ask which names, addresses, or departments matter.

nodes.title: Paydata: Permit and Zoning Cache
nodes.description: You recover useful permit, zoning, inspection, or licensing records. Tell the GM you recovered permit/zoning paydata for valuation or operational use.

nodes.title: Paydata: Admin / Payroll / Meeting Cache
nodes.description: You recover employee, payroll, meeting, or interdepartment mail paydata. Tell the GM you recovered admin archive paydata; exact value and sensitivity are GM-facing.

nodes.title: Paydata: Utility / Public-Works Routing
nodes.description: You recover utility routing, service interruption, or public-works schedule paydata. Tell the GM you recovered utility/public-works paydata and ask whether it has operational or resale value.

nodes.title: Permanent Outcome: Civic Record Change
nodes.description: You edit or suppress a protected civic record. Notify the GM immediately: this is a permanent campaign-state change. Tell the GM what record category changed, what cover signature was used, and whether alarms or audit trails were suppressed.

choices.label: Log off before the audit queue catches up

nodes.title: Service Window Exit
nodes.description: The host stamps your departure as routine service-window traffic and the marble lobby fades back into the downtown grid.
